raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase on XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  for {$1700.00} with XXXX XXXX On my promo balance it shows that the purchase was {$2900.00} with promo expiration of XX/XX/XXXX. I called on XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  for an explanation and resolution. I was on the phone for a total of 38 minutes. I was transferred to a rep in the payment allocation department. I re explained my issue. I told her I had a {$600.00} refund on XX/XX/XXXX that was applied to this promo balance. I told her that I called 2 weeks earlier to have it applied to a balance with an upcoming expiration date. She immediately told me that it is impossible for a refund to be applied that way and that my statement was wrong about my refund being applied to an unrelated promo balance. I requested that she actually review my account before telling me something incorrect. She placed me on hold and then transferred me to a recording for a MATTRESS WARRANTY!
